TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sierra_leone, title = Sierra_leone, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sierra_leone} }

S.FORM: Sierra Leone hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 30 N, 11 30 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 71,740 sq km (maki' tay 119ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 71,620 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 120 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,018,888. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 56.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 6.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Freetown. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 27 na tay spayat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ernest Bai Koroma, aring ryax 17 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Sierra Leone hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 30 N, 11 30 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 71,740 sq km (maki' tay 119ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 71,620 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 120 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,018,888. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 56.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 6.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Freetown. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 27 na tay spayat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ernest Bai Koroma, aring ryax 17 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēierra leone ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, ** ** w na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *reetown. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj s~…ēpajat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ernes~…ēt ő≤ai koroma, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
